data.title: Golar LNG Limited – Q1 2026 results presentation
data.description: Golar LNG is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 20, 2026, before the market opens. A webcast presentation is scheduled to take place at 08:00am Eastern Time (1:00pm London Time) on the same day. Those interested can access the presentation by downloading it from the Investor Relations segment on Golar LNG's website at www.golarlng.com.

data.title: Consensus Cloud Solutions to Host Q1 2026 Investor Call on May 7, 2026
data.description: Consensus Cloud Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCSI) is hosting a live audio webcast of its Q1 2026 earnings call on May 7th, 2026, at 2:00 PM PT/5:00 PM ET. The event is open to the public, members of the press, the financial community, and interested parties. CEO Scott Turicchi, CRO Johnny Hecker, and CFO Adam Varon will lead the call to review the financial performance of Q1 2026. This presents a valuable opportunity to gain insights into the company's performance and future prospects.

data.title: Spire Advances Agriculture Intelligence with Integrated Soil Moisture Data and Weather Forecasts
data.description: Spire Global, Inc. (NYSE: SPIR), based in Vienna, Virginia, unveiled an enhanced agriculture intelligence package. The service combines soil moisture data and weather forecasting into a comprehensive platform. It integrates over 40 years of historical data with real-time satellite observations, offering a detailed analysis of past, present, and future soil moisture and weather conditions. This solution aims to provide valuable insights to farmers and agricultural businesses to improve productivity and decision-making processes.

data.title: Novo Nordisk A/S – Share repurchase programme
data.description: In Bagsværd, Denmark, on April 7, 2026, Novo Nordisk began a share repurchase plan on February 4, 2026, in line with Regulation No 596/2014 of the European Parliament and Council and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. This initiative is part of a larger share buyback program totaling DKK 15 billion, set to take place over a one-year span starting from February 4, 2026.

data.title: The No. 9 UniFirst Chevy and Chase Elliott Drive to Victory at Martinsville Speedway
data.description: UniFirst Corporation, a prominent provider of customized business uniform programs, facility service products, and first aid and safety services in North America, achieved a significant victory at Martinsville Speedway. The win occurred on Sunday, April 7, 2026, in Wilmington, Massachusetts. UniFirst Corporation's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol UNF.

data.title: When Every Beat Matters, BD Helps Clinicians Eliminate Blind Spots with Continuous, Noninvasive Blood Pressure Insight
data.description: The release of the HemoSphere Stream™ Module is set to enhance access to continuous, noninvasive arterial waveform data through a range of bedside monitors and various care environments, enabling a greater number of clinicians to monitor patients in real-time. This development was announced in Franklin Lakes, N.J. on April 7, 2026. It is expected to provide crucial insights to a larger number of patients, expanding medical monitoring capabilities.

data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals Announces Publication of NEW DAY Clinical Trial Results in Ophthalmology
data.description: On April 7, 2026, ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANIP) shared findings of the NEW DAY clinical trial featuring ILUVIEN ® (fluocinolone acetonide intravitreal implant), 0.19 mg, for diabetic macular edema treatment in Ophthalmology, the American Academy of Ophthalmology's journal. Results were initially disclosed in July 2025. ILUVIEN, a corticosteroid, is prescribed for diabetic macular edema (DME) in patients previously treated with corticosteroids without a significant increase in intraocular pressure.

data.title: Amazon And USPS Strike Deal On Package Handling, Averting Major Cutback: Report
data.description: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) has reached a tentative agreement with the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) regarding package handling to avoid a significant decrease in package volume. The deal entails a 20% reduction in the number of packages Amazon will send through USPS, a notable shift from Amazon's initial threat to cut package volume by two-thirds. The agreement is now under review by the Postal Regulatory Commission. In the previous year, USPS managed over 1 billion Amazon packages, indicating the key role the Amazon-USPS partnership plays in parcel flow. Responses from Amazon.com and USPS are pending.
